title: Guru
subTitle: A few political goons, disguised as Muslims, cause trouble at the temple and kill Raghuraman's family. Later, Raghuraman joins an extremist group and decides to avenge his family's death.

title: Aaghosham
subTitle: Jackie kills his lover Nancy when she ends up marrying his business rival, Rex. However, Rex sets out to avenge the death of his wife.

title: Mayajalam
subTitle: Things take a humourous turn when a rich man puts up a matrimonial advertisement for his daughter, prompting several men to show up at his house.

title: Aaru Sundarimaarude Katha
subTitle: Six women from different paths of life join hands to fight for their respective families. However, things take a turn when one of them gets murdered.

title: My Dear Mummy
subTitle: Widowed young, Katrina strives to overcome life's challenges. Determined to improve her English skills, she enrols in her daughter Sandra's college, embarking on a transformative journey of personal growth.

title: Pakshe
subTitle: Balachandran marries a woman from a wealthy family to save his own family from crippling debts but loses his childhood love in the process. Trapped in an abusive marriage, he is consumed by regret and despair.

title: Naane Varuven
subTitle: When Prabhu's daughter gets possessed by a young boy, the distraught father's desperation to save his child leads him to his estranged twin, who has serial killing tendencies.

title: Ennalum Ente Aliya
subTitle: Two immigrant families who live in the building in Dubai inadvertently square up because of a romantic misunderstanding. Things take a turn when the real culprits of the love affairs are revealed.

title: CARNIVAL
subTitle: Bharatan, a gambler, finds employment at the local carnival and soon becomes the favourite employee. However, things get complicated when the owner of the company dies and Bharatan is accused.

title: Ee Thirakkinidayil
subTitle: In his quest to get his friend out of financial trouble, Ananthan, a villager, borrows money from Savithri, a nurse. Despite knowing that he is money-minded and shrewd, she falls in love with him.

title: Sarovaram
subTitle: Devadathan, a musician settled in France, is excited to return to his family in India. However, he is taken aback to learn that his siblings have developed hostile feelings for him.

title: Kerala House Udan Vilpanakku
subTitle: Dinesh lands in trouble when he endeavours to sell his magnificent abode that happens to be located on the border of two states, creating unwanted issues.

title: Pauran
subTitle: Diwakaran, an honest politician, raises his voice against the atrocities of his party. His life is no more a pleasant journey as he earns the wrath of other members of the party.

title: Sethurama Iyer CBI
subTitle: Alex, who is awaiting execution, confesses to having committed six out of the seven murders he is convicted for. Officer Sethurama Iyer decides to trace the original murderer of the seventh one.

title: Laabam
subTitle: After returning to his home town from exile, Pakkiri, challenges Vanagamudi, the village chief. Soon, with the locals support he then tries to overhaul the village's farming techniques.

title: Paleri Manikyam
subTitle: The mysterious death of Manikyam, a young girl in the 1950s, proved to be unsolvable due to flaws in the case. Over 50 years later, Haridas reopens the case in an attempt to bring the truth to light.

title: Kusruthi Kuruppu
subTitle: A wealthy man's solitary life turns upside down when a village visit leads to an unexpected romance. His heart is captured by a humble girl and he embraces love, transforming his isolated existence.

title: Thekkekkara Superfast
subTitle: A man secures a job as a bus attendant after a prolonged delay. However,a surprising turn of events leads him to fall head over heels in love with his employer's daughter.

title: Sevenes.
subTitle: Shyam, Ashokan, Sharath, Shaukath, Arun, Vijeesh and Linto are seven young men who are passionate about football. But when they get involved in a crime, they try to prove their innocence.

title: Meleparambil Anveedu
subTitle: Owing to their secret marriage, Harikrishnan is forced to keep Pavizham as his maid. However, when his parents discover her pregnancy, they decide to dismiss her from the job.

title: Apoorvaragam
subTitle: Roopesh and Nancy are in love. Nancy's father offers one crore rupees to Roopesh to withdraw from this relationship. Things take a turn when Roopesh agrees and accepts the money.
